keys.subject: Your 14-day free trial has started — ${service}
keys.headline: Don't lose your data
keys.introHtml: Your trial ended 3 days ago. Your data is still safe on your dedicated server, but it will be powered off in 4 days if you do not upgrade.
keys.closingHtml: After powering off, you have 30 more days before the server and all data are permanently deleted.
keys._sourceNote: Extracted from trial-last-chance.ts — full HTML/text managed in web-i18n locales; template code uses locale resolver.
